parameters.query:
=-- KPIs: total views, viral count, engagement, active accounts
SELECT
  -- Total views in period
  COALESCE(SUM(m.views), 0) AS total_views,
  
  -- Viral reels (>50K views)
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.views > 50000 THEN c.content_id END) AS viral_count,
  
  -- Average engagement rate
  ROUND(
    AVG(CASE WHEN m.views > 0 
      THEN (m.likes + m.comments + m.shares)::DECIMAL / m.views * 100 
      END)::NUMERIC, 2
  ) AS avg_engagement,
  
  -- Active accounts (posted in period)
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) AS active_accounts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.views < 5000 THEN a.account_id END) AS underperforming,
  
  -- Platform breakdown
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.platform = 'instagram' THEN m.views ELSE 0 END) AS instagram_views,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.platform = 'tiktok' THEN m.views ELSE 0 END) AS tiktok_views,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.platform = 'youtube' THEN m.views ELSE 0 END) AS youtube_views,
  
  -- Daily trend (last 7 days as JSON array)
  json_agg(
    json_build_object('date', day_views.date, 'views', day_views.daily_views)
    ORDER BY day_views.date
  ) AS daily_trend
  
FROM accounts a
JOIN content c ON c.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON m.content_id = c.content_id
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT 
    date,
    SUM(views) AS daily_views
  FROM metrics_daily
  WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $('Parse Request').item.json.periodDays }} days'
  GROUP BY date
) AS day_views
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $('Parse Request').item.json.periodDays }} days'
  AND a.active = true;

=-- All accounts with performance metrics
SELECT
  a.account_id,
  a.username,
  a.platform,
  a.niche,
  a.followers_count,
  a.display_name,
  
  -- Views in period
  COALESCE(SUM(m.views), 0) AS views_period,
  
  -- Engagement rate
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(
      AVG(CASE WHEN m.views > 0 
        THEN (m.likes + m.comments + m.shares)::DECIMAL / m.views * 100 
        END), 0
    )::NUMERIC, 2
  ) AS engagement_rate,
  
  -- Viral reels count
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.views > 50000 THEN c.content_id END) AS viral_reels,
  
  -- Total posts in period
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.content_id) AS posts_count,
  
  -- Status
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(m.views) > 1000000 THEN 'hot'
    WHEN SUM(m.views) > 200000 THEN 'rising'
    WHEN SUM(m.views) > 50000 THEN 'active'
    ELSE 'low'
  END AS status,
  
  -- 7-day trend as array
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'date', d.date,
      'views', COALESCE(d.dv, 0)
    ) ORDER BY d.date
  ) AS trend
  
FROM accounts a
LEFT JOIN content c ON c.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN metrics_daily m ON m.content_id = c.content_id
  AND m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $('Parse Request').item.json.periodDays }} days'
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT 
    gs.date::DATE AS date,
    SUM(md2.views) AS dv
  FROM generate_series(
    CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days', 
    CURRENT_DATE, 
    '1 day'
  ) AS gs(date)
  LEFT JOIN content c2 ON c2.account_id = a.account_id
  LEFT JOIN metrics_daily md2 ON md2.content_id = c2.content_id 
    AND md2.date = gs.date::DATE
  GROUP BY gs.date
) d ON true
WHERE a.active = true
GROUP BY a.account_id, a.username, a.platform, a.niche, a.followers_count, a.display_name
ORDER BY views_period DESC;

=-- Viral reels with full genealogy
SELECT
  c.content_id,
  c.title AS hook,
  c.platform,
  c.url,
  c.posted_at,
  c.account_id,
  a.username AS account_name,
  a.niche,
  
  -- Performance
  MAX(m.views) AS views,
  MAX(m.likes) AS likes,
  MAX(m.comments) AS comments,
  MAX(m.shares) AS shares,
  MAX(m.saves) AS saves,
  
  -- Traceability - FULL GENOME
  s.script_text,
  s.script_id,
  i.idea_text,
  i.idea_id,
  hv.hook_text,
  hv.hook_variant_id,
  hp.pattern_name AS hook_pattern,
  t.transcript_text,
  t.transcript_id,
  sr.reel_url AS source_reel_url,
  sr.views AS source_views,
  sr.source_reel_id,
  cr.username AS source_creator,
  cr.niche AS source_niche
  
FROM content c
JOIN accounts a ON c.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON m.content_id = c.content_id
LEFT JOIN scripts s ON c.script_id = s.script_id
LEFT JOIN ideas i ON c.idea_id = i.idea_id
LEFT JOIN hook_variants hv ON c.hook_variant_id = hv.hook_variant_id
LEFT JOIN hook_patterns hp ON hv.hook_pattern_id = hp.hook_pattern_id
LEFT JOIN transcripts t ON c.transcript_id = t.transcript_id
LEFT JOIN source_reels sr ON c.source_reel_id = sr.source_reel_id
LEFT JOIN creators cr ON sr.creator_id = cr.creator_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $('Parse Request').item.json.periodDays }} days'
GROUP BY
  c.content_id, c.title, c.platform, c.url, c.posted_at, c.account_id,
  a.username, a.niche,
  s.script_text, s.script_id,
  i.idea_text, i.idea_id,
  hv.hook_text, hv.hook_variant_id,
  hp.pattern_name,
  t.transcript_text, t.transcript_id,
  sr.reel_url, sr.views, sr.source_reel_id,
  cr.username, cr.niche
HAVING MAX(m.views) > 50000
ORDER BY MAX(m.views) DESC
LIMIT 50;

=-- Hook pattern performance
SELECT
  hp.pattern_name,
  hp.hook_pattern_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.content_id) AS uses,
  ROUND(AVG(m.views)::NUMERIC, 0) AS avg_views,
  ROUND(
    AVG(CASE WHEN m.views > 0 
      THEN (m.likes + m.comments + m.shares)::DECIMAL / m.views * 100 
      END)::NUMERIC, 2
  ) AS avg_engagement,
  MAX(m.views) AS best_views,
  
  -- Top hook text for this pattern
  (
    SELECT hv2.hook_text
    FROM hook_variants hv2
    JOIN content c2 ON c2.hook_variant_id = hv2.hook_variant_id
    JOIN metrics_daily m2 ON m2.content_id = c2.content_id
    WHERE hv2.hook_pattern_id = hp.hook_pattern_id
    ORDER BY m2.views DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS best_hook_text
  
FROM hook_patterns hp
JOIN hook_variants hv ON hv.hook_pattern_id = hp.hook_pattern_id
JOIN content c ON c.hook_variant_id = hv.hook_variant_id
JOIN metrics_daily m ON m.content_id = c.content_id
WHERE m.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $('Parse Request').item.json.periodDays }} days'
GROUP BY hp.pattern_name, hp.hook_pattern_id
ORDER BY avg_engagement DESC;

-- Also get pipeline status
SELECT
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'generated' THEN 1 END) AS ideas_pending,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 END) AS ideas_approved
FROM ideas;

SELECT
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 END) AS scripts_ready,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'draft' THEN 1 END) AS scripts_draft
FROM scripts;

SELECT
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'rendering' THEN 1 END) AS videos_rendering,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) AS videos_done
FROM generated_videos
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE;
